lesson: Mix on the back panel with a faint burning smell and normal output means the rear beater shaft seal is flinging mix onto the motor — a different seal from the barrel or door.
symptoms: Mix appearing on the back panel of the machine.
Faint burning smell during busy periods.

tests.inspect-beater: A fine spray of dried mix around the rear of the barrel housing, trailing back along the beater shaft toward the motor.

flavour: Located the leak. Somewhere behind everything.
authenticityNote: The beater shaft seal prevents mix from migrating rearward along the shaft into the motor bay. When it fails the machine still works, but the motor gets progressively coated in milk protein — the burning smell is that protein cooking on the housing.
